anti_pattern_hits: output-contract-drift: strategy response risked summarizing files instead of surfacing lanes and subagents

workflow_gaps.summary: Strategy responses must show P1, lanes, subagents, dependency flow, gate state, and next human action directly.
workflow_gaps.evidence: user correction: it should give the lanes, subagents

anti_pattern_hits: inventory-hook-ambiguity: inventory trace risked recording dispatch machinery instead of the strategy result

workflow_gaps.summary: The inventory hook must inventory the strategy result, not only cite the dispatch mechanism.
workflow_gaps.evidence: user correction: it should inventory the result of the strategy

workflow_gaps.summary: Standalone repository needed local sigil-development and workflow-reflect packages so future users are not dependent on private upstream paths.
workflow_gaps.evidence: repo-local .agents/skills initially lacked sigil-development and workflow-reflect

workflow_gaps.summary: Read-only observer confirmed the strategy-result inventory hook is now present and recommended checklist, closeout, and P14 hardening.
